children.heading: Competitive grant program
children.label: 1 Competitive grant program
children.text: The Secretary shall establish a competitive grant program to encourage basic and applied research and the development of qualified agricultural countermeasures.

children.label: A
children.text: the Secretary has declared a plant or animal disease emergency under the Plant Protection Act ( et seq.) or the Animal Health Protection Act ( et seq.); and7 U.S.C. 77017 U.S.C. 8301

children.label: B
children.text: waiving the requirement would lead to the rapid development of a qualified agricultural countermeasure, as determined by the Secretary.
$50,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2013; and
$15,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2014 through 2023.
